item.title: Hooking Up a Camper on the Highway
item.description: A highway recovery setup involves carefully hooking up a camper in a live traffic environment, requiring safety awareness and quick execution.

media:content.media:title: Hooking Up a Camper on the Highway
media:content.media:description: A highway recovery setup involves carefully hooking up a camper in a live traffic environment, requiring safety awareness and quick execution.

item.title: 40T VAC Truck Stuck Frame-Deep
item.description: A 40-ton VAC truck is buried frame-deep, turning the recovery into a serious heavy-duty challenge. With limited traction and high stakes, extraction requires precision and power.

media:content.media:title: 40T VAC Truck Stuck Frame-Deep
media:content.media:description: A 40-ton VAC truck is buried frame-deep, turning the recovery into a serious heavy-duty challenge. With limited traction and high stakes, extraction requires precision and power.

item.title: Edge Recovery: Finding the Best Way Out
item.description: A difficult edge-of-control recovery situation tests skill, timing, and equipment choice as crews search for the safest way to bring everything back under control. One wrong move could change everything.

media:content.media:title: Edge Recovery: Finding the Best Way Out
media:content.media:description: A difficult edge-of-control recovery situation tests skill, timing, and equipment choice as crews search for the safest way to bring everything back under control. One wrong move could change everything.

item.title: Heavy Duty Transport in Action
item.description: A look at heavy duty transport work in action, focused on the equipment and recovery process used to move large vehicles and machinery safely. What part of the operation stands out most?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Duty Transport in Action
media:content.media:description: A look at heavy duty transport work in action, focused on the equipment and recovery process used to move large vehicles and machinery safely. What part of the operation stands out most?

item.title: Towed This Semi Out of the Ditch
item.description: A semi-truck recovery operation pulls a stranded vehicle out of a ditch, showcasing coordination, strength, and the right towing setup

media:content.media:title: Towed This Semi Out of the Ditch
media:content.media:description: A semi-truck recovery operation pulls a stranded vehicle out of a ditch, showcasing coordination, strength, and the right towing setup

item.title: Towing a Flipped Car
item.description: A straightforward recovery operation showing a flipped car being towed from the scene. The focus is on the towing process and the equipment used to move the vehicle safely.

media:content.media:title: Towing a Flipped Car
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recovery operation showing a flipped car being towed from the scene. The focus is on the towing process and the equipment used to move the vehicle safely.

item.title: Caught in a Cable Trap: Untangling the Knot
item.description: A heavy recovery situation centers on a cable trap and the process of working through the knot with recovery equipment. The focus is on the real-world rescue and towing steps involved.

media:content.media:title: Caught in a Cable Trap: Untangling the Knot
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery situation centers on a cable trap and the process of working through the knot with recovery equipment. The focus is on the real-world rescue and towing steps involved.

item.title: Truck With a Broken Leg Handling
item.description: A heavy truck recovery operation focused on handling a damaged vehicle with the right equipment and controlled steps. The process highlights towing and field recovery work in a real-world setting.

media:content.media:title: Truck With a Broken Leg Handling
media:content.media:description: A heavy truck recovery operation focused on handling a damaged vehicle with the right equipment and controlled steps. The process highlights towing and field recovery work in a real-world setting.

item.title: Nighttime Tow Rescue
item.description: A nighttime tow rescue showing heavy recovery work in real conditions. The focus is on the towing process and vehicle recovery at the scene. What stood out most about this operation?

media:content.media:title: Nighttime Tow Rescue
media:content.media:description: A nighttime tow rescue showing heavy recovery work in real conditions. The focus is on the towing process and vehicle recovery at the scene. What stood out most about this operation?

item.title: This Was a Real Challenge
item.description: A straightforward recovery operation focused on the challenge at hand. What stood out most to you?

media:content.media:title: This Was a Real Challenge
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recovery operation focused on the challenge at hand. What stood out most to you?

item.title: New Saturn Tick: Tick, Chiggers and Snakes
item.description: An outdoor adventure comes with its fair share of hazards as ticks, chiggers, and snakes make their presence known. What challenges—and surprises—await in the field?

media:content.media:title: New Saturn Tick: Tick, Chiggers and Snakes
media:content.media:description: An outdoor adventure comes with its fair share of hazards as ticks, chiggers, and snakes make their presence known. What challenges—and surprises—await in the field?

item.title: Just Another Day in the Shop
item.description: A collection of routine but challenging workshop tasks highlights the daily grind of heavy repair and fabrication work. What makes “normal” days still so intense?

media:content.media:title: Just Another Day in the Shop
media:content.media:description: A collection of routine but challenging workshop tasks highlights the daily grind of heavy repair and fabrication work. What makes “normal” days still so intense?

item.title: Chrysler Pulled Out of the Bushes
item.description: A Chrysler is recovered from the bushes using towing and rescue equipment in a real-world recovery operation. The focus is on the pull, the setup, and the field work involved.

media:content.media:title: Chrysler Pulled Out of the Bushes
media:content.media:description: A Chrysler is recovered from the bushes using towing and rescue equipment in a real-world recovery operation. The focus is on the pull, the setup, and the field work involved.

item.title: Testing the Limits of the Shop Crane
item.description: A shop crane is pushed to its limits during a demanding lift, demonstrating its strength and safety capabilities. How much can it really handle?

media:content.media:title: Testing the Limits of the Shop Crane
media:content.media:description: A shop crane is pushed to its limits during a demanding lift, demonstrating its strength and safety capabilities. How much can it really handle?

item.title: I Don't Need a Rotator
item.description: A recovery job is completed successfully without the use of a rotator, showcasing skillful technique and efficient equipment use. What made this possible?

media:content.media:title: I Don't Need a Rotator
media:content.media:description: A recovery job is completed successfully without the use of a rotator, showcasing skillful technique and efficient equipment use. What made this possible?

item.title: Pulling a Tractor From the Pond
item.description: A submerged or partially submerged tractor is carefully pulled from a pond using heavy recovery equipment. How did it end up there?

media:content.media:title: Pulling a Tractor From the Pond
media:content.media:description: A submerged or partially submerged tractor is carefully pulled from a pond using heavy recovery equipment. How did it end up there?
